message:
Command `
# 35m43s CPU / ~11.4min elapsed. Still in silent phase.
# This is between track assignment completion and "Start detail routing"
# Track assignment takes ~30s elapsed, data prep ~1s.
# At DRT1's rate: 0th routing iteration starts at ~6:30 elapsed.
# We're at 11.4min elapsed - should be INTO the 0th iteration already!
# But pipe shows no new messages...
# 
# Either: pipe is not being read correctly, or DRT is computing silently.
# 
# Let me check the pipe manager is still alive

echo "=== Pipe manager check ==="
ps aux | grep "pipe_manager\|drt3_pipe" | grep -v grep | head -5
echo "Last 3 pipe log lines:"
tail -3 /tmp/drt3_pipe.log | grep -v "^$"

# Also check step 72 log
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
echo "=== Step 72 log (last 20 lines) ==="
tail -20 "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log" 2>/dev/null
` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:
{"command": "
# 35m43s CPU / ~11.4min elapsed. Still in silent phase.
# This is between track assignment completion and "Start detail routing"
# Track assignment takes ~30s elapsed, data prep ~1s.
# At DRT1's rate: 0th routing iteration starts at ~6:30 elapsed.
# We're at 11.4min elapsed - should be INTO the 0th iteration already!
# But pipe shows no new messages...
# 
# Either: pipe is not being read correctly, or DRT is computing silently.
# 
# Let me check the pipe manager is still alive

echo "=== Pipe manager check ==="
ps aux | grep "pipe_manager\|drt3_pipe" | grep -v grep | head -5
echo "Last 3 pipe log lines:"
tail -3 /tmp/drt3_pipe.log | grep -v "^$"

# Also check step 72 log
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
echo "=== Step 72 log (last 20 lines) ==="
tail -20 "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log" 2>/dev/null
", "timeout": 15}
function.name: execute_bash
